You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.01 (commit: a24e5d1d).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA] Show lists directly on dropdown menu if there are 2 or fewer
We are currently grouping the Lists in a "Lists" submenu independent of the number of lists the user has, but we should only show that submenu when the user has over 2 lists.

So if the user has 2 or fewer, they should be displayed directly in the menu root.

![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/5091503/57e663d9-218f-4a58-a447-05a86406ea86)

Internal ref: pcdRpT-4tr-p2#comment-7237

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}
140→

231→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 2
232→            add(mockLikedTag()) // item 3
233→            add(mockA8CTag()) // item 4
234→        }
235→
236→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
237→
238→        val customListsItem = menu.findSubMenu()
239→        assertThat(menu).doesNotContain(MenuElementData.Divider)
240→        assertThat(customListsItem).isNull()
241→    }
242→
243→    @Test
244→    fun `GIVEN single menu item built with helper WHEN getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem then return correct index`() {
245→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
246→            add(mockFollowingTag()) // item 0
247→            add(mockDiscoverTag()) // item 1
248→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 2
249→            add(mockLikedTag()) // item 3
250→            add(mockA8CTag()) // item 4
251→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 5
252→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 6
253→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 7
254→        }
255→
256→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
257→
258→        val discoverItem = menu
259→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover) }!!
260→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(discoverItem)).isEqualTo(1)
261→
262→        val subscriptionsItem = menu
263→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions) }!!
264→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(subscriptionsItem)).isEqualTo(0)
265→
266→        val savedItem = menu
267→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved) }!!
268→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(savedItem)).isEqualTo(2)
269→
270→        val likedItem = menu
271→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked) }!!
272→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(likedItem)).isEqualTo(3)
273→
274→        val a8cItem = menu
275→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic) }!!
276→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(a8cItem)).isEqualTo(4)
277→
278→        val customList1Item = menu.findSubMenu()!!
279→            .children
280→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-1") }!!
281→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(customList1Item)).isEqualTo(5)
282→
283→        val customList2Item = menu.findSubMenu()!!
284→            .children
285→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-2") }!!
286→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(customList2Item)).isEqualTo(6)
287→
288→        val customList3Item = menu.findSubMenu()!!
289→            .children
290→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-3") }!!
291→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(customList3Item)).isEqualTo(7)
292→    }
293→
294→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSingleItem(
295→        predicate: (MenuElementData.Item.Single) -> Boolean
296→    ): MenuElementData.Item.Single? {
297→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.Single && predicate(it) } as? MenuElementData.Item.Single
298→    }
299→
300→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSubMenu(): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu? {
301→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu } as? MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu
302→    }
303→
304→    private fun mockDiscoverTag(): ReaderTag {
305→        return mock {
306→            on { isDiscover } doReturn true
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    private fun mockFollowingTag(): ReaderTag {
311→        return mock {
312→            on { isFollowedSites } doReturn true
313→        }
314→    }
315→
316→    private fun mockSavedTag(): ReaderTag {
317→        return mock {
318→            on { isBookmarked } doReturn true
319→        }
320→    }
321→
322→    private fun mockLikedTag(): ReaderTag {
323→        return mock {
324→            on { isPostsILike } doReturn true
325→        }
326→    }
327→
328→    private fun mockA8CTag(): ReaderTag {
329→        return mock {
330→            on { isA8C } doReturn true
331→        }
332→    }
333→
334→    private fun mockFollowedP2sTag(): ReaderTag {
335→        return mock {
336→            on { isP2 } doReturn true
337→            on { tagTitle } doReturn "Followed P2s"
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    private fun mockTagsTag(): ReaderTag {
342→        return mock {
343→            on { isTags } doReturn true
344→        }
345→    }
346→
347→    private fun createCustomListTag(title: String): ReaderTag {
348→        return ReaderTag(
349→            title,
350→            title,
351→            title,
352→            "http://endpoint.com",
353→            ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST
354→        )
355→    }
356→}

218→            // Limit string resources to Mag16 only for Jetpack

220→            resourceConfigurations = ["ar", "de", "es", "fr", "he", "id", "it", "ja", "ko", "nl", "pt-rBR", "ru", "sv", "tr", "zh-rCN", "zh-rTW"]
221→            // Note 2: `in` is the legacy locale code for `id` and `iw` is the legacy locale code for `he`.
222→            // We need to include those to make sure users with older Android versions and still using those legacy codes still have those translations show up at runtime.
223→            resourceConfigurations += ["in", "iw"]

252→        def properties = loadPropertiesFromFile(checkGradlePropertiesFile())
253→        addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(wordpress, properties, ['wp'])

324→/// Dynamically add `buildConfigFields` on a given variant/flavor from prefixed properties
325→/// (This is used to e.g. add every property prefixed `wp.` in `gradle.properties` as a BuildConfigField in the `wordpress` flavor)
326→///
327→/// `prefixes` is an array of prefixes to search for, without their `.` dot (e.g. `["wp", "jp"]`).
328→/// Properties found with prefixes first in that array will be overridden by the ones found with prefixes later in the array.
329→static def addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(variant, properties, prefixes) {
330→    // Build a Map of prefixed properties found. Keys in this Map will be lowercased and `.` replaced by `_`
331→    def fields_map = [:]
332→    prefixes.each { prefix ->
333→        properties.each { property ->
334→            if (property.key.toLowerCase().startsWith("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.")) {
335→                def key = property.key.toLowerCase().replace("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.", "").replace(".", "_")
336→                fields_map[key] = property.value
337→            }
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    // Then define the found properties as buildConfigFields
342→    fields_map.each {
343→        variant.buildConfigField "String", it.key.toUpperCase(), "\"${it.value}\""
344→    }
345→}

559→    implementation "com.airbnb.android:lottie-compose:$lottieVersion"

562→    implementation "androidx.compose.material3:material3:$androidxComposeMaterial3Version"
563→
564→    // Cascade - Compose nested menu
565→    implementation "me.saket.cascade:cascade-compose:2.3.0"
566→
567→    // - Flipper
568→    debugImplementation ("com.facebook.flipper:flipper:$flipperVersion") {
569→        exclude group:'org.jetbrains.kotlinx', module:'kotlinx-serialization-json-jvm'
570→    }
571→    debugImplementation "com.facebook.soloader:soloader:$soLoaderVersion"
572→    debugImplementation ("com.facebook.flipper:flipper-network-plugin:$flipperVersion"){
573→        exclude group:'org.jetbrains.kotlinx', module:'kotlinx-serialization-json-jvm'
574→    }
575→    releaseImplementation "com.facebook.flipper:flipper-noop:$flipperVersion"
576→}
577→
578→configurations.all {
579→    // Exclude packaged wordpress sub projects, force the use of the source project
580→    // (eg. use :libs:utils:WordPressUtils instead of 'org.wordpress:utils')
581→    exclude group: 'org.wordpress', module: 'analytics'
582→}
583→
584→
585→// If Google services file doesn't exist, copy example file
586→if (!file("google-services.json").exists()) {
587→    copy {
588→        from(".")
589→        into(".")
590→        include("google-services.json-example")
591→        rename('google-services.json-example', 'google-services.json')
592→    }
593→}
594→
595→// Print warning message if example Google services file is used.
596→if ((file('google-services.json').text) == (file('google-services.json-example').text)) {
597→    println("WARNING: You're using the example google-services.json file. Google login will fail.")
598→}
599→
600→tasks.register("violationCommentsToGitHub", ViolationCommentsToGitHubTask) {
601→    repositoryOwner = "wordpress-mobile"
602→    repositoryName = "WordPress-Android"
603→    pullRequestId = System.properties['GITHUB_PULLREQUESTID']
604→    username = System.properties['GITHUB_USERNAME']
605→    password = System.properties['GITHUB_PASSWORD']
606→    oAuth2Token = System.properties['GITHUB_OAUTH2TOKEN']
607→    gitHubUrl = "https://api.github.com/"
608→    createCommentWithAllSingleFileComments = false
609→    createSingleFileComments = true
610→    commentOnlyChangedContent = true
611→    minSeverity = SEVERITY.INFO //ERROR, INFO, WARN
612→    commentTemplate = """
613→**Reporter**: {{violation.reporter}}{{#violation.rule}}\n
614→**Rule**: {{violation.rule}}{{/violation.rule}}
615→**Severity**: {{violation.severity}}
616→**File**: {{violation.file}}:{{violation.startLine}}{{#violation.source}}
617→**Source**: {{violation.source}}{{/violation.source}}
618→{{violation.message}}
619→"""
620→    violations = [
621→            ["CHECKSTYLE", ".", ".*/build/.*/checkstyle/.*\\.xml\$", "CheckStyle"],
622→            ["CHECKSTYLE", ".", ".*/build/.*/detekt/.*\\.xml\$", "Detekt"]
623→    ]
624→}
625→
626→tasks.register("dependencyTreeDiffCommentToGitHub", ViolationCommentsToGitHubTask) {
627→    repositoryOwner = "wordpress-mobile"
628→    repositoryName = "WordPress-Android"
629→    pullRequestId = System.properties['GITHUB_PULLREQUESTID']
630→    oAuth2Token = System.properties['GITHUB_OAUTH2TOKEN']
631→    gitHubUrl = "https://api.github.com/"
632→    createCommentWithAllSingleFileComments = true
633→    createSingleFileComments = false
634→    commentOnlyChangedContent = true
635→    commentOnlyChangedFiles = false
636→    minSeverity = SEVERITY.INFO
637→    commentTemplate = """
638→<details><summary>The PR caused some dependency changes (expand to see details)</summary>
639→<p>
640→
641→```diff
642→{{{violation.message}}}
643→```
644→
645→</p>
646→</details>
647→
648→*Please review and act accordingly*
649→"""
650→    violations = [
651→            ["GENERIC", ".", ".*/build/.*/diff/.*\\.txt\$", "DependenciesDiffChecker"],
652→    ]
653→}
654→
655→tasks.register("printVersionName") {
656→    doLast {
657→        println android.defaultConfig.versionName
658→    }
659→}
660→
661→tasks.register("printAllVersions") {
662→    doLast {
663→        android.applicationVariants.all { variant ->
664→            println "${variant.name}: ${variant.versionName} (${variant.versionCode})"
665→        }
666→    }
667→}
668→
669→tasks.register("printResourceConfigurations") {
670→    doLast {
671→        android.productFlavors.each { flavor ->
672→            if (flavor.dimension == "app") {
673→                println "${flavor.name}: ${flavor.resourceConfigurations}"
674→            }
675→        }
676→    }
677→}
678→
679→def checkGradlePropertiesFile() {
680→    def inputFile = file("${rootDir}/gradle.properties")
681→    if (!inputFile.exists()) {
682→        throw new StopActionException("Build configuration file gradle.properties doesn't exist, follow README instructions")
683→    }
684→    return inputFile
685→}
686→
687→static def loadPropertiesFromFile(inputFile) {
688→    def properties = new Properties()
689→    inputFile.withInputStream { stream ->
690→        properties.load(stream)
691→    }
692→    return properties
693→}
694→
695→// For app signing
696→if (["uploadStoreFile", "uploadStorePassword", "uploadKeyAlias", "uploadKeyPassword"].count { !project.hasProperty(it) } == 0) {
697→    android {
698→        signingConfigs {
699→            release {
700→                storeFile = rootProject.file(project.uploadStoreFile)
701→                storePassword = project.uploadStorePassword
702→                keyAlias = project.uploadKeyAlias
703→                keyPassword = project.uploadKeyPassword
704→            }
705→        }
706→    }
707→    android.buildTypes.release.signingConfig = android.signingConfigs.release
708→}
709→
710→if (project.hasProperty("debugStoreFile")) {
711→    def sharedDebugStore = file(project.debugStoreFile.replaceFirst("^~", System.getProperty("user.home")))
712→    if (sharedDebugStore.exists()) {
713→        android {
714→            signingConfigs {
715→                debug {
716→                    storeFile sharedDebugStore
717→                }
718→            }
719→        }
720→    }
721→}
722→
723→// Copy React Native JavaScript bundle and source map so they can be upload it to the Crash logging
724→// service during the build process.
725→android {
726→    applicationVariants.configureEach { variant ->
727→        def variantAssets = variant.mergeAssetsProvider.get().outputDir.get()
728→
729→        tasks.register("delete${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap", Delete) {
730→            delete(fileTree(dir: variantAssets, includes: ['**/*.bundle.map']))
731→        }
732→
733→        tasks.register("copy${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap", Copy) {
734→            from(variantAssets)
735→            into("${buildDir}/react-native-bundle-source-map")
736→            include("*.bundle", "*.bundle.map")
737→            finalizedBy("delete${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap")
738→        }
739→
740→        variant.mergeAssetsProvider.configure {
741→            finalizedBy("copy${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap")
742→        }
743→    }
744→}
745→

125→allprojects {
126→    apply plugin: 'checkstyle'
127→    apply plugin: 'io.gitlab.arturbosch.detekt'
128→
129→    repositories {

131→        mavenCentral()
132→        maven {
133→            url "https://a8c-libs.s3.amazonaws.com/android/jcenter-mirror"

136→                includeVersion "com.automattic", "rest", "1.0.8"

154→
155→        classpath = files()
156→    }
157→
158→    checkstyle {
159→        toolVersion = '8.3'
160→        configFile file("${project.rootDir}/config/checkstyle.xml")
161→    }
162→
163→    detekt {
164→        toolVersion = gradle.ext.detektVersion
165→        baseline = file("${project.rootDir}/config/detekt/baseline.xml")
166→        config = files("${project.rootDir}/config/detekt/detekt.yml")
167→        autoCorrect = false
168→        buildUponDefaultConfig = true
169→        disableDefaultRuleSets = false
170→        ignoreFailures = false
171→        parallel = true
172→        debug = false
173→    }
174→
175→    tasks.withType(KotlinCompile).all {
176→        kotlinOptions {
177→            jvmTarget = JavaVersion.VERSION_1_8
178→            allWarningsAsErrors = true
179→            freeCompilerArgs += [
180→                    "-opt-in=kotlin.RequiresOptIn",
181→                    "-Xjvm-default=all"
182→            ]
183→        }
184→    }
185→}

187→// Onboarding and dev env setup tasks
188→tasks.register("checkBundler", Exec) {
189→    doFirst {
190→        println "Check Bundler"
191→    }
192→
193→    workingDir = './'
194→    executable "sh"
195→    args "-c", "if ! type 'bundle' > /dev/null; then gem install bundler; fi"
196→
197→    //store the output instead of printing to the console:
198→    standardOutput = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
199→
200→    //extension method checkBundler.output() can be used to obtain the output:
201→    ext.output = {
202→        return standardOutput.toString()
203→    }
204→}
205→
206→tasks.register("checkBundle", Exec) {
207→    dependsOn tasks.named("checkBundler")
208→    doFirst {
209→        println "Check Bundle"
210→    }
211→
212→    workingDir = './'
213→    executable "sh"
214→    args "-c", "bundle check --path=\${BUNDLE_PATH:-vendor/bundle} > /dev/null || bundle install --jobs=3 --retry=3 --path=\${BUNDLE_PATH:-vendor/bundle}"
215→
216→    //store the output instead of printing to the console:
217→    standardOutput = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
218→
219→    //extension method checkBundle.output() can be used to obtain the output:
220→    ext.output = {
221→        return standardOutput.toString()
222→    }
223→}
224→
225→tasks.register("applyCredentials", Exec) {
226→    dependsOn tasks.named("checkBundle")
227→    doFirst {
228→        println "Apply credentials for this branch"
229→    }
230→
231→    workingDir = './'
232→    executable "sh"
233→    args "-c", "FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 FASTLANE_ENV_PRINTER=1 bundle exec fastlane run configure_apply force:true"
234→
235→    //store the output instead of printing to the console:
236→    standardOutput = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
237→
238→    //extension method checkBundle.output() can be used to obtain the output:
239→    ext.output = {
240→        return standardOutput.toString()
241→    }
242→}
243→
244→tasks.register("configureApply") {
245→    group = 'Onboarding'
246→    description = 'Install dependencies for debug and production builds'
247→    dependsOn applyCredentials
248→    doLast {
249→        println("Done")
250→    }
251→}
252→
253→dependencies {
254→    detektPlugins "io.gitlab.arturbosch.detekt:detekt-formatting:$gradle.ext.detektVersion"
255→}
256→
257→apply from: './config/gradle/code_coverage.gradle'
258→apply from: './config/gradle/gradle_build_scan.gradle'

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown
 2→
 3→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 5→
 6→sealed interface MenuElementData {
 7→    data object Divider : MenuElementData
 8→
 9→    sealed class Item(
10→        open val id: String,
11→        open val text: UiString,
12→        @DrawableRes open val leadingIcon: Int,
13→    ) : MenuElementData {
14→        // Item element that closes the menu when clicked
15→        data class Single(
16→            override val id: String,
17→            override val text: UiString,
18→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
19→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
20→
21→        // Sub-menu element that opens a sub-menu when clicked
22→        data class SubMenu(
23→            override val id: String,
24→            override val text: UiString,
25→            val children: List<MenuElementData>,
26→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
27→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
28→    }
29→}
30→
31→internal const val NO_ICON = -1
32→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}
140→

218→            // Limit string resources to Mag16 only for Jetpack

220→            resourceConfigurations = ["ar", "de", "es", "fr", "he", "id", "it", "ja", "ko", "nl", "pt-rBR", "ru", "sv", "tr", "zh-rCN", "zh-rTW"]
221→            // Note 2: `in` is the legacy locale code for `id` and `iw` is the legacy locale code for `he`.
222→            // We need to include those to make sure users with older Android versions and still using those legacy codes still have those translations show up at runtime.
223→            resourceConfigurations += ["in", "iw"]

253→        addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(wordpress, properties, ['wp'])

255→    }

324→/// Dynamically add `buildConfigFields` on a given variant/flavor from prefixed properties
325→/// (This is used to e.g. add every property prefixed `wp.` in `gradle.properties` as a BuildConfigField in the `wordpress` flavor)
326→///
327→/// `prefixes` is an array of prefixes to search for, without their `.` dot (e.g. `["wp", "jp"]`).
328→/// Properties found with prefixes first in that array will be overridden by the ones found with prefixes later in the array.
329→static def addBuildConfigFieldsFromPrefixedProperties(variant, properties, prefixes) {
330→    // Build a Map of prefixed properties found. Keys in this Map will be lowercased and `.` replaced by `_`
331→    def fields_map = [:]
332→    prefixes.each { prefix ->
333→        properties.each { property ->
334→            if (property.key.toLowerCase().startsWith("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.")) {
335→                def key = property.key.toLowerCase().replace("${prefix.toLowerCase()}.", "").replace(".", "_")
336→                fields_map[key] = property.value
337→            }
338→        }
339→    }
340→
341→    // Then define the found properties as buildConfigFields
342→    fields_map.each {
343→        variant.buildConfigField "String", it.key.toUpperCase(), "\"${it.value}\""
344→    }
345→}

679→def checkGradlePropertiesFile() {
680→    def inputFile = file("${rootDir}/gradle.properties")
681→    if (!inputFile.exists()) {
682→        throw new StopActionException("Build configuration file gradle.properties doesn't exist, follow README instructions")
683→    }
684→    return inputFile
685→}
686→
687→static def loadPropertiesFromFile(inputFile) {
688→    def properties = new Properties()
689→    inputFile.withInputStream { stream ->
690→        properties.load(stream)
691→    }
692→    return properties
693→}

723→// Copy React Native JavaScript bundle and source map so they can be upload it to the Crash logging
724→// service during the build process.
725→android {
726→    applicationVariants.configureEach { variant ->
727→        def variantAssets = variant.mergeAssetsProvider.get().outputDir.get()
728→
729→        tasks.register("delete${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap", Delete) {
730→            delete(fileTree(dir: variantAssets, includes: ['**/*.bundle.map']))
731→        }
732→
733→        tasks.register("copy${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap", Copy) {
734→            from(variantAssets)
735→            into("${buildDir}/react-native-bundle-source-map")
736→            include("*.bundle", "*.bundle.map")
737→            finalizedBy("delete${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap")
738→        }
739→
740→        variant.mergeAssetsProvider.configure {
741→            finalizedBy("copy${variant.name.capitalize()}ReactNativeBundleSourceMap")
742→        }
743→    }
744→}

187→// Onboarding and dev env setup tasks
188→tasks.register("checkBundler", Exec) {
189→    doFirst {
190→        println "Check Bundler"
191→    }
192→
193→    workingDir = './'
194→    executable "sh"
195→    args "-c", "if ! type 'bundle' > /dev/null; then gem install bundler; fi"
196→
197→    //store the output instead of printing to the console:
198→    standardOutput = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
199→
200→    //extension method checkBundler.output() can be used to obtain the output:
201→    ext.output = {
202→        return standardOutput.toString()
203→    }
204→}
205→
206→tasks.register("checkBundle", Exec) {
207→    dependsOn tasks.named("checkBundler")
208→    doFirst {
209→        println "Check Bundle"
210→    }
211→
212→    workingDir = './'
213→    executable "sh"
214→    args "-c", "bundle check --path=\${BUNDLE_PATH:-vendor/bundle} > /dev/null || bundle install --jobs=3 --retry=3 --path=\${BUNDLE_PATH:-vendor/bundle}"
215→
216→    //store the output instead of printing to the console:
217→    standardOutput = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
218→
219→    //extension method checkBundle.output() can be used to obtain the output:
220→    ext.output = {
221→        return standardOutput.toString()
222→    }
223→}
224→
225→tasks.register("applyCredentials", Exec) {
226→    dependsOn tasks.named("checkBundle")
227→    doFirst {
228→        println "Apply credentials for this branch"
229→    }
230→
231→    workingDir = './'
232→    executable "sh"
233→    args "-c", "FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 FASTLANE_ENV_PRINTER=1 bundle exec fastlane run configure_apply force:true"
234→
235→    //store the output instead of printing to the console:
236→    standardOutput = new ByteArrayOutputStream()
237→
238→    //extension method checkBundle.output() can be used to obtain the output:
239→    ext.output = {
240→        return standardOutput.toString()
241→    }
242→}
243→
244→tasks.register("configureApply") {
245→    group = 'Onboarding'
246→    description = 'Install dependencies for debug and production builds'
247→    dependsOn applyCredentials
248→    doLast {
249→        println("Done")
250→    }
251→}
